# AgentSite Kit

> Make any website Agent-friendly. Scan, classify, extract, and serve structured data for AI agents.

AgentSite Kit is an open-source CLI toolkit that scans websites, classifies pages, extracts content, and generates structured outputs (llms.txt, JSON APIs, MCP) so AI agents can reliably read, search, and query your site.

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/lingfan36/AgentSite-Kit/blob/main/README.md): Full documentation, quick start, configuration
- [README (中文)](https://github.com/lingfan36/AgentSite-Kit/blob/main/README.zh-CN.md): Chinese documentation
- [Contributing](https://github.com/lingfan36/AgentSite-Kit/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): Development setup and contribution guide

## Features

- Scan: Discovers pages via sitemap or crawling, respects robots.txt
- Classify: Auto-detects page types (docs, FAQ, blog, product, pricing, changelog)
- Extract: Titles, summaries, headings, metadata, body content
- Generate: llms.txt, agent-sitemap.json, agent-index.json, structured JSON
- Serve: Query API for agents to search and retrieve content
- MCP: Model Context Protocol server for direct AI tool integration
- Dynamic Site Management: Add, remove, scan sites via REST API at runtime
- Multi-Site: Manage multiple websites from a single instance
- LLM-Assisted: Optional AI-powered classification and summarization
- Plugin System: Lifecycle hooks for custom processing

## API Endpoints

- GET /api/health: Health check
- GET /api/search?q={query}: Full-text search
- GET /api/pages/{id}: Single page details
- GET /api/docs: Documentation entries
- GET /api/faq: FAQ entries
- GET /api/products: Product entries
- GET /api/articles: Blog/article entries
- GET /api/pricing: Pricing information
- GET /api/changelog: Changelog entries
- GET /api/stats: Site statistics
- GET /api/sites: List all configured sites
- POST /api/sites: Add a new site (body: {url, name, description})
- DELETE /api/sites/{slug}: Remove a site
- POST /api/sites/{slug}/scan: Scan a specific site
- POST /api/rescan: Rescan all, or pass {url} for ad-hoc scan
- GET /api/config: Current configuration
- GET /api/files: Generated file listing

## MCP Tools

- search: Search site content by keyword
- get_page: Get page details by URL
- list_pages: List pages with optional type filter
- list_faq: FAQ entries with optional category filter
- list_docs: Documentation with optional section filter
- list_products: Product entries
- list_articles: Articles with optional tag filter
- list_pricing: Pricing/plan entries
- list_changelog: Changelog with optional version filter
- site_overview: High-level site stats
- ask: Natural language question about site content

## Quick Start

- Install: npm install -g agentsite-kit
- Initialize: agentsite init
- Scan: agentsite scan
- Generate: agentsite generate
- Serve: agentsite serve
- MCP: agentsite mcp

## Optional

- [llms-full.txt](https://github.com/lingfan36/AgentSite-Kit/blob/main/llms-full.txt): Detailed technical reference
